# Email Manager

> Gmail workspace with local semantic search — private email tooling.

## Product

- [Home](https://mail.sassmaker.com/): App shell
- [FAQ](https://mail.sassmaker.com/faq): Frequently asked questions

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://mail.sassmaker.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://mail.sassmaker.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://mail.sassmaker.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
